fn id(a: A): A / {} { a }
---
id : (A) -> A
==========
fn keep(a: A): A / {} { a }
---
keep : (A) -> A
==========
fn f(a: A): A / {} { let x = a; x }
---
f : (A) -> A
==========
fn bad(): A / {} { x }
---
ERROR: unknown variable `x`
==========
fn bad(a: A): B / {} { a }
---
ERROR: type mismatch: expected B, got A
==========
fn f(job: thunk A): A / {} { force job }
---
f : (thunk A) -> A
